About GLS SPA – Innovating Light, Elevating Spaces*   
 
Let’s build the future of lighting — together.  
At GLS SPA, we don’t just manufacture lights we create illumination experiences 
that transform spaces. With over 25 years of expertise, we have established ourselves 
as a leading lighting solutions provider, offering a diverse portfolio of architectural, 
commercial, decorative, and industrial lighting.
Driven by innovation and precision, GLS SPA is committed to customised lighting 
solutions tailored to meet the unique demands of interior designers, architects, and 
lighting professionals. With a catalog of 8,000+ products, including high performance 
LED xtures, magnetic track systems, and tunable lighting, we seamlessly integrate 
design, technology, and efciency.
Our mission is to set new benchmarks in the lighting industry, ensuring each product 
enhances aesthetics, functionality, and sustain ability. Whether it’s a luxury retail space, 
a hospitality masterpiece, or an urban infrastructure project, GLS SPA delivers 
exceptional lighting solutions that redene environments.
Customizable. Efcient. Timeless.*

False Colour Rendering is a visual technique used to represent light, heat, or intensity variations using articial 
colors instead of natural ones. In lighting and imaging, it helps designers quickly analyze brightness levels, 
contrast, and uniformity. By assigning colors to different values, false colour rendering makes invisible data 
easy to understand, improving accuracy in design evaluation and performance optimization.
False Colour Rendering
Red = very high lux  
Yellow = medium lux  
Blue = low lux*

LED spot lights are compact, high-efciency luminaires designed to deliver focused,
directional illumination with minimal glare and power consumption. They are ideal 
for highlighting architectural details, products, artworks, and specic zones within 
residential, retail, hospitality, and commercial spaces. Using advanced LED technology, 
spot lights provide long life, stable performance, and excellent color rendering while 
signicantly reducing energy costs. Available in xed or adjustable designs, LED spot 
lights offer exibility in beam angle, color temperature, and control options such as 
DALI, Casambi, Smart Life, or RF remote, enabling precise lighting control and enhanced 
visual comfort.

LED Laser Blade lights are ultra-slim, high-precision linear luminaires engineered to create
sharp, clean lines of light with exceptional visual comfort. Featuring advanced optical
control and deep anti-glare technology, they deliver a “laser-thin” beam appearance 
while maintaining high efciency and uniform illumination. Ideal for modern architectural,
retail, ofce, and hospitality spaces, Laser Blade lights enhance spatial geometry and 
design aesthetics. With customizable lengths, beam angles, color temperatures, and 
smart control options such as DALI and Casambi, they offer designers maximum exibility
with minimal visual intrusion

panels to improve both visual comfort and acoustic comfort in a space. They reduce 
echo and noise while providing soft, glare-free lighting. Ideal for ofces, conference

and personal health.

The reverberation time decreases with the

thereby greatly reducing the

Reduced reverberation :-
Reduce environmental noise :-
When the noise emitted by the noise 
source is incident on the sound-
absorbing material, most of the sound 
energy will be absorbed, thereby
reducing the total noise of the room.  
Improve speech intelligibility :-
The sound absorbing material reduces 
the reverberation time of the room, and 
also reduces the reected sound, which 
greatly reduces the interference of 
reverberation and reected sound, 
thereby improving the speech 
intelligibility between people.

269:
Magnetic LightMagnetic lighting is a exible and modular lighting system where luminaires attach 
magnetically to a low-voltage track. It allows easy repositioning, tool-free installation, 
and clean architectural design. Ideal for homes, retail, ofces, and hospitality spaces, 
magnetic lights offer adaptable lighting layouts with a minimalist, modern aesthetic.
271:
FLEXO takes the concept of a track capable of powering and supporting 
multiple lighting elements to the extreme, providing both high-tech and 
expressivebeauty. The section of turn is just 5.3 x 18.2 mm, which can 
be bent at the construction site, simply, to accommodate any geometric 
shapes dictated by the lighting requirements and by the architecture. 
It is possible to outline curves that are accentuated to different
extents, free and sinuous shapes that come together with a
wealth of light performance.
